title: Broiled Broccoli Peanut Wrap
description: A kid-friendly and umami-rich Argentinean dish featuring broiled broccoli with a sweet honey glaze and a crunchy peanut topping for a dairy-free-friendly treat.
instructions: Coat the broccoli florets with a bit of olive oil and season lightly with salt and garlic powder.
Arrange the coated broccoli on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil for about 5 minutes until crispy, turning once halfway through.
In a small bowl, mix honey and peanut butter together until smooth. Drizzle over the broccoli.
Let cool slightly before serving in individual wraps or plates.
